programmes.show_description: In Florida, an investigator captures dark shadow figures while walking through a cemetery and a young girl in Ohio sees the ghost of her late grandfather. (S8, ep 16)
Mutant Mermaid, UFOs vs Nukes and Seamonster Chases a Boat: Is a dead mermaid really preserved in Japan? And are UFOs attracted to nuclear facilities? (S3, ep 19)
Alien Sabotage, Ghost Child and Hungry Hungry Sasquatch: Strange creatures are encountered and a home security video may be proof that UFOs are messing with technology. (S3, ep 20)
The UFO Files: In this special, Tony Harris reviews the latest developments and most compelling photographic evidence from a tumultuous year of UFO revelations. (S4, ep 8)
Medieval Lincoln: Alice is in Lincoln, getting to grips with life in medieval England. She visits the magnificent cathedral that was once the tallest building in the world. (S3, ep 1)
Restoration London: Alice heads to London to attempt to make sense of the world-changing events during the short but eventful Restoration period. (S3, ep 2)
Bradford 1: David Dickinson's team are in Bradford. Tim is brimming over a Lalique bowl. Will David Hakeney let a vintage train set go to auction for the sake of a tenner? (S10, ep 20)
Roadmaster Rick: Rick and Corey discover an old Buick Roadmaster, Chum checks out a doll and volleyball signed by Tom Hanks and a samurai sword lands on the counter. (S24, ep 10)
...Henry's Wreck-trospective.The Stratford Wreck- Trospective: Henry's Wreck-trospective dives headfirst into the archives to celebrate the very best bits from the series. (S1, ep 2)
The Mom Factor: Jarrod and Brandi have some fun as they attempt to beat the competition. Meanwhile, Casey tries her hand at bidding. (S6, ep 20)
The Emperor of El Monte: Buyers Darrell, Brandon, Jarrod, Brandi and Ivy head to El Monte, California where they tackle the local competition head on. (S7, ep 9)
Judgment Day: The buyers are in for the fight of their lives as they lock horns at the nation's biggest shipping container auction. (S1, ep 21)
Bid or Die: Newbies Scott and Chrissy push their way onto Brandon and Lori's turf, forcing the couple to burn cash like never before. (S2, ep 1)
Sailing Away: The Israelis go after what they think is vintage clothing. Meanwhile, a custom container could land a buyer in jail. (S2, ep 5)
The Winter Games: Containers bound for the games in Russia miss the boat. A waterlogged container piques everyone's interest. (S2, ep 6)
Wild Drums: Jake lets his pack loose on a mountain lion and comes face-to-face with a bear. Tom and Jack build traditional drums as they prepare to reopen the trading post. (S11, ep 11)
Bubble Trouble: As the team relaunches their investigation on Skinwalker Ranch, they are surrounded by a shocking phenomenon. (S6, ep 1)
Pawntourage: Things go nuclear when a Japanese Godzilla toy hits the counter. Chum does battle over a jacket and a Johnny Drama whiskey bottle tries to join Chum's entourage. (S24, ep 9)
Deep In The Heart Of Upland: A surprise visitor from Texas shows up in time for a series of heated auctions in Upland, where a bad day for Ivy ends with a big bang. (S7, ep 5)
Daneurysm: Brandi struggles to keep Jarrod focused at abandoned locker auctions in Hemet. Meanwhile, Dan and Laura Dotson find themselves faced with a life or death crisis. (S7, ep 6)
...Henry's Wreck-trospective. The Bromley Wreck-Trospective: Get ready for a high-octane nostalgia trip as Junk & Disorderly Henry's Wreck-trospective dives into the archives.(S1, ep 3)
The Top Ten Mysteries of the Deep: Count down the top ten mysteries of the deep, from sunken continents to supposed proof of the lost city of Atlantis. (S15, ep 17)
Searching For Bigfoot: Experts investigate why sightings of Bigfoot are so often accompanied by reports of UFOs. Could the Sasquatch be an alien living in our midst? (S1, ep 5)
Judgment Day: The buyers are in for the fight of their lives as they lock horns at the nation's biggest shipping container auction. (S1, ep 21)
Bid or Die: Newbies Scott and Chrissy push their way onto Brandon and Lori's turf, forcing the couple to burn cash like never before. (S2, ep 1)
The Mom Factor: Jarrod and Brandi have some fun as they attempt to beat the competition. Meanwhile, Casey tries her hand at bidding. (S6, ep 20)
The Emperor of El Monte: Buyers Darrell, Brandon, Jarrod, Brandi and Ivy head to El Monte, California where they tackle the local competition head on. (S7, ep 9)
Bradford 2: David Dickinson's team are in Bradford. Tim is brimming over a Lalique bowl. Will David Hakeney let a vintage train set go to auction for the sake of a tenner? (S10, ep 21)
Bursting the Bubble: As the team launches high-powered rockets into the sky on Skinwalker Ranch, they are frozen in shock by what they encounter. (S6, ep 4)
Chip off the Orb Block: Notorious phenomenon-experiencer Chris Bledsoe's daughter Emily may share his abilities and they face the Monroe Institute and the Everglades. (S3, ep 4)
Health and Wealth: With the help of modern science, uncover the secrets of health and wealth in Ancient Egypt from Queen Hatshepsut's death to a case of breast cancer. (S1, ep 5)
Decline And Fall: Scientists and historians join forces to investigate whether colossal volcanoes toppled an ancient dynasty and reveal the true face of an ancient mummy. (S1, ep 6)
The Mystery Of Loch Ness: Giorgio Tsoukalos investigates whether sightings of the Loch Ness monster could be caused by a disturbance in the space-time continuum. (S1, ep 4)
The Top Ten Mysteries of the Deep: Count down the top ten mysteries of the deep, from sunken continents to supposed proof of the lost city of Atlantis. (S15, ep 17)
Wild Drums: Jake lets his pack loose on a mountain lion and comes face-to-face with a bear. Tom and Jack build traditional drums as they prepare to reopen the trading post. (S11, ep 11)
Drama Online Part 2: Ashley has to face the consequences of her rash decision, Seth takes a ride in a hovercraft and Les does business with Muhammad Ali Jr. (S11, ep 6)
Daddy Daughter Dance: When Ashley steals a deal from right under Les's nose, the family decides to hold a father-daughter sales competition. (S11, ep 7)
Seth's Gamble Part 1: When Les finds out that Seth has spent thousands of dollars at a sports card auction, he challenges his son to sell all the new items within a week. (S11, ep 8)
Join antiques expert and presenter David Dickinson as more collectors try to sell their items to dealers. Will they strike a deal or take a chance at auction instead? (S9, ep 41)
Bradford 2: David Dickinson's team are in Bradford. Tim is brimming over a Lalique bowl. Will David Hakeney let a vintage train set go to auction for the sake of a tenner? (S10, ep 21)
Maximum Pawnage: Chum sniffs out a 1920s Baccarat bottle, while Rick takes a look at a sealed copy of Spiderman and Venom: Maximum Carnage video game. (S24, ep 11)
...Henry's Wreck-trospective. The Bromley Wreck-Trospective: Get ready for a high-octane nostalgia trip as Junk & Disorderly Henry's Wreck-trospective dives into the archives.(S1, ep 3)
Deep In The Heart Of Upland: A surprise visitor from Texas shows up in time for a series of heated auctions in Upland, where a bad day for Ivy ends with a big bang. (S7, ep 5)
Daneurysm: Brandi struggles to keep Jarrod focused at abandoned locker auctions in Hemet. Meanwhile, Dan and Laura Dotson find themselves faced with a life or death crisis. (S7, ep 6)
Never a Safe Bet: Jesse knows you don't strike it rich if you play it safe - so he gambles big on a risky bin. (S2, ep 2)
Checkmate: A deadly bin puts all the buyers on edge, while Brandon and Lori square off against Scott and Chrissy in a bidding war that sends all strategy out the window. (S2, ep 3)
Surf's Up: A surprise item may send the Israelis in search of major dollars. Jason strikes on a container full of wood and weird gear. (S2, ep 7)
The Big Not-So-Easy: Items from New Orleans stimulate a frenzy of bidding, while a refrigerated unit sends chills down bidders' spines. (S2, ep 8)
Turning Tides: Josh fends off dangerous bulls to protect a bison mother during a tough birth. Meanwhile, Horstman embarks on a journey to hunt for the largest bears on earth. (S11, ep 12)
The Drone Zone: When the gigantic, invisible Bubble raises new questions for the team, possible answers suddenly fall from the sky. (S6, ep 2)
Roadmaster Rick: Rick and Corey discover an old Buick Roadmaster, Chum checks out a doll and volleyball signed by Tom Hanks and a samurai sword lands on the counter. (S24, ep 10)
The Education of Miss Profit: Darrell and Brandon discover the sweet taste of success, Mary looks for love and Jarrod and Brandi return to Moreno Valley. (S7, ep 7)
The Return Of The Mogul's Return: Even a fight with Laura can't keep Dave away from locker auctions in Montclair. Plus, how will Jarrod's hangover affect his bidding? (S7, ep 2)
Episode 9: Henry and Skid score big in Derbyshire, revisit Ed for a missed bike and tackle repairs before Skid and Allen brave the sales stand alone. (S4, ep 9)
The Gods of Greece: Explore whether the Gods of Greece including Zeus, Apollo and Poseidon, were actually extra-terrestrial visitors to Earth. (S15, ep 18)
The Mystery Of The Cyclops: Experts investigate whether an advanced civilisation of giants built Malta's mysterious megaliths. Could they have had extraterrestrial help? (S1, ep 6)
Never a Safe Bet: Jesse knows you don't strike it rich if you play it safe - so he gambles big on a risky bin. (S2, ep 2)
Checkmate: A deadly bin puts all the buyers on edge, while Brandon and Lori square off against Scott and Chrissy in a bidding war that sends all strategy out the window. (S2, ep 3)
Deep In The Heart Of Upland: A surprise visitor from Texas shows up in time for a series of heated auctions in Upland, where a bad day for Ivy ends with a big bang. (S7, ep 5)
Daneurysm: Brandi struggles to keep Jarrod focused at abandoned locker auctions in Hemet. Meanwhile, Dan and Laura Dotson find themselves faced with a life or death crisis. (S7, ep 6)
Bradford 3: The owner of a gold coin collection hopes he can turn his investment into a profit. Dealer Tim offers extra cash to a seller if he can name famous Bradfordians. (S10, ep 22)
Episode 9: Henry and Skid score big in Derbyshire, revisit Ed for a missed bike and tackle repairs before Skid and Allen brave the sales stand alone. (S4, ep 9)
Diamond in the Rough: A real Diamond T truck build has Mike and his crew scrambling to keep up with their client demands. (S5, ep 8)
Baby on Board!: Two men attempt a carjacking at a Louisiana car wash. A hapless teenage driver turns an Alabama parking lot into a demolition derby. (S1, ep 9)
Wrong Way: A disagreement over driving rules in a Washington State parking lot ends with multiple gunshots. A confrontational driver pushes two friends to the brink. (S1, ep 10)
